framework.name: OAuth Breaks at Multi-Hop Delegation
framework.description: Okta explicitly admits traditional OAuth tokens can't be restricted after issuance without recontacting the auth server, which breaks in decentralized agent systems. This is a major IdP vendor acknowledging the composition approach has a structural gap — even as they sell the composition approach.
framework.raw_quote: Traditional OAuth tokens can't be restricted after issuance without recontacting the auth server, which breaks in decentralized systems. Secure delegation needs token formats that support offline attenuation.

source.title: Control the Chain, Secure the System: Fixing AI Agent Delegation
